## Outcome

Describe the user-visible result and affected requirement IDs.

## Scope

List canonical files changed, generated surfaces affected, and any public API/behavior change.

## Verification

List exact commands and results. Link immutable CI/evidence artifacts when available.

## Quality review

- [ ] Canonical source/generator was changed instead of hand-patching generated output.
- [ ] Behavior, errors, async cleanup, and adverse states are tested where applicable.
- [ ] Accessibility, keyboard/focus, responsive, RTL/localization, forced-colors, and reduced-motion effects were reviewed.
- [ ] Source/package parity and updater impact were considered.
- [ ] Public docs, contracts, Passports, migration notes, and Changeset were updated when required.
- [ ] No credential, private path, personal data, or unredacted hostile payload was added.
- [ ] Commits carry DCO sign-off.

## Evidence and limitations

List current evidence, known limitations, affected risk class, visual-change explanation, and any follow-up issue. Do not describe an automated accessibility result as universal conformance.
